name: My Wife
short_description: Meet your new digital companion - an ultra-cute desktop mascot that brings life to your screen! Place her anywhere on your desktop and enjoy immersive interactions and heartwarming moments.
detailed_description:
"My Wife" is a desktop simulation game featuring an adorable character living on your computer screen. Position her anywhere, watch her dynamically interact with your desktop environment, and enjoy delightful companionship with fresh interactive experiences.

Game Features:

• Freely drag, rotate, and scale your character
• Import local custom models (supports VRM formats 0.x and 1.0) to create your own unique desktop companion
• Steam Workshop support - share your mods with others or download creations from the community
• Built-in Pomodoro Timer for focused work/study sessions
• Multi-monitor switching support

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil
